channel.title: +Heredetary info on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Heredetary info on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Shared fraction
item.description: Siblings Bell curve with 50% median, 40-60% effective range. Gross Recombination is the cause of the uncertainty. Inter-species when people compare species, they are usually talking about the % of the genome that is the same in both, or the % of genes that are found in both.
